\u001b[36m0:00:00\u001b[0m:00:01\u001b[0m\n\u001b[?25h","output_type":"stream"}],"execution_count":1},{"cell_type":"code","source":"# 2. 임포트\nimport torch\nimport torch.nn as nn\nimport numpy as np\nfrom transformers import MambaModel, MambaConfig, AutoTokenizer\nfrom datasets import load_dataset\nfrom torch.utils.data import DataLoader\nfrom torch.amp import autocast, GradScaler\nfrom torch.optim import AdamW\nfrom tqdm.auto import tqdm\nimport random\nimport gc\nimport os\n\nos.environ[\"TOKENIZERS_PARALLELISM\"] = \"false\"\nos.environ[\"MAMBA_FORCE_BUILD\"] = \"FALSE\"\ndevice = \"cuda\" if torch.cuda.is_available() else \"cpu\"\nprint(f\"디바이스: {device}\")","metadata":{"trusted":true,"execution":{"iopub.status.busy":"2026-05-13T10:40:37.704530Z","iopub.execute_input":"2026-05-13T10:40:37.705341Z","iopub.status.idle":"2026-05-13T10:40:57.305204Z","shell.execute_reply.started":"2026-05-13T10:40:37.705255Z","shell.execute_reply":"2026-05-13T10:40:57.304509Z"}},"outputs":[{"name":"stdout","text":"디바이스: cuda\n","output_type":"stream"}],"execution_count":2},{"cell_type":"code","source":"# 3. 모델 정의\ndef get_dct_matrix(n):\n    dct = np.zeros((n, n))\n    for k in range(n):\n        for i in range(n):\n            if k == 0:\n                dct[k, i] = np.sqrt(1/n)\n            else:\n                dct[k, i] = np.sqrt(2/n) * np.cos(np.pi * k * (2*i + 1) / (2*n))\n    return torch.tensor(dct, dtype=torch.float32)\n\nclass AttentionPooling(nn.Module):\n    def __init__(self, hidden_size):\n        super().__init__()\n        self.attention = nn.Linear(hidden_size, 1)\n    \n    def forward(self, hidden_states):\n        weights = torch.softmax(self.attention(hidden_states), dim=1)\n        return (hidden_states * weights).sum(dim=1)\n\nclass HierarchicalOrthogonalSubspace(nn.Module):\n    def __init__(self, hidden_size):\n        super().__init__()\n        half = hidden_size // 2\n        self.half = half\n\n        low  = half // 4\n        mid  = half // 4\n        high = half // 2  # low:mid:high = 1:1:2\n\n        self.S_pos_low  = nn.Linear(half, low,  bias=False)\n        self.S_neg_low  = nn.Linear(half, low,  bias=False)\n        self.S_pos_mid  = nn.Linear(half, mid,  bias=False)\n        self.S_neg_mid  = nn.Linear(half, mid,  bias=False)\n        self.S_pos_high = nn.Linear(half, high, bias=False)\n        self.S_neg_high = nn.Linear(half, high, bias=False)\n\n        dct = get_dct_matrix(half)  # (half, half) → 정보 손실 없음\n        self._init_layer(self.S_pos_low,  dct[:low])\n        self._init_layer(self.S_neg_low,  dct[:low].flip(0))\n        self._init_layer(self.S_pos_mid,  dct[low:low+mid])\n        self._init_layer(self.S_neg_mid,  dct[low:low+mid].flip(0))\n        self._init_layer(self.S_pos_high, dct[low+mid:low+mid+high])\n        self._init_layer(self.S_neg_high, dct[low+mid:low+mid+high].flip(0))\n\n    def _init_layer(self, layer, weight):\n        layer.weight.data.copy_(weight)\n\n    def forward(self, x):\n        x_pos = x[:, :self.half]\n        x_neg = x[:, self.half:]\n\n        result = {}\n        for level, S_pos, S_neg in [\n            ('low',  self.S_pos_low,  self.S_neg_low),\n            ('mid',  self.S_pos_mid,  self.S_neg_mid),\n            ('high', self.S_pos_high, self.S_neg_high),\n        ]:\n            e_pos = torch.clamp(torch.norm(S_pos(x_pos), dim=-1) / np.sqrt(S_pos.out_features), max=10.0)\n            e_neg = torch.clamp(torch.norm(S_neg(x_neg), dim=-1) / np.sqrt(S_neg.out_features), max=10.0)\n            result[f'e_pos_{level}'] = e_pos\n            result[f'e_neg_{level}'] = e_neg\n            result[f'ratio_{level}'] = e_pos / (e_pos + e_neg + 1e-8)\n            result[f'r_{level}']     = torch.sqrt(e_pos**2 + e_neg**2 + 1e-8)\n\n        return result\n\nclass ContraMamba(nn.Module):\n    def __init__(self, model_name):\n        super().__init__()\n        config = MambaConfig.from_pretrained(model_name)\n        config.use_mamba_kernels = True\n        self.mamba = MambaModel.from_pretrained(model_name, config=config)\n        hidden_size = self.mamba.config.hidden_size\n        \n        for name, param in self.mamba.named_parameters():\n            if 'A_log' in name:\n                param.requires_grad = False\n        \n        self.pool = AttentionPooling(hidden_size)\n        self.subspace = HierarchicalOrthogonalSubspace(hidden_size)\n        \n    def forward(self, input_ids):\n        outputs = self.mamba(input_ids=input_ids)\n        pooled = self.pool(outputs.last_hidden_state)\n        subspace_out = self.subspace(pooled)\n        \n        return subspace_out\n\n\n    def compute_loss(self, subspace_out, labels,\n                 margin=0.3, lambda_radius=0.05, lambda_spread=0.1,\n                 level_weights={'low': 0.5, 'mid': 0.3, 'high': 0.2}):\n\n        pos_mask = (labels == 2)\n        neg_mask = (labels == 0)\n        known_mask = (labels != 1).float()\n        total_loss = 0.0\n    \n        for level, w in level_weights.items():\n            ratio = subspace_out[f'ratio_{level}']\n            r     = subspace_out[f'r_{level}']\n    \n            direction_loss = (\n                known_mask * (\n                    pos_mask.float() * torch.relu((0.5 + margin) - ratio) +\n                    neg_mask.float() * torch.relu(ratio - (0.5 - margin))\n                )\n            ).sum() / (known_mask.sum() + 1e-8)\n    \n            radius_loss = (\n                known_mask * torch.relu(1.0 - r)\n            ).sum() / (known_mask.sum() + 1e-8)\n    \n            pos_centroid = ratio[pos_mask].mean() if pos_mask.sum() > 0 else torch.tensor(0.5, device=ratio.device)\n            neg_centroid = ratio[neg_mask].mean() if neg_mask.sum() > 0 else torch.tensor(0.5, device=ratio.device)\n\n            # between/within 비율 계산 시 backbone gradient 차단\n            between = (pos_centroid - neg_centroid) ** 2\n            \n            # 수정\n            pos_var = ratio[pos_mask].var(unbiased=False) if pos_mask.sum() > 1 else torch.tensor(0.0, device=ratio.device)\n            neg_var = ratio[neg_mask].var(unbiased=False) if neg_mask.sum() > 1 else torch.tensor(0.0, device=ratio.device)\n\n\n            within = torch.clamp(pos_var + neg_var, min=1e-4)\n            spread_loss = -torch.tanh((between / within).detach())\n            total_loss = total_loss + w * (direction_loss + lambda_radius * radius_loss + lambda_spread * spread_loss)\n    \n        return total_loss\n\n    def classify_geometric(self, subspace_out, r_min=1.0, r_max=5.0, delta=0.3):\n        # low: coarse 판단 기준, high: ambiguity/contradiction 세분화\n        ratio_low  = subspace_out['ratio_low']\n        ratio_high = subspace_out['ratio_high']\n        r_low      = subspace_out['r_low']\n        r_high     = subspace_out['r_high']\n    \n        preds = torch.ones(ratio_low.shape[0], dtype=torch.long, device=ratio_low.device)\n        true_mask  = (ratio_low > 0.5 + delta)\n        false_mask = (ratio_low < 0.5 - delta)\n        preds[true_mask]  = 2\n        preds[false_mask] = 0\n    \n        ratio_high_cpu = ratio_high.cpu()\n        r_low_cpu      = r_low.cpu()\n        r_high_cpu     = r_high.cpu()\n        true_mask_cpu  = true_mask.cpu()\n        false_mask_cpu = false_mask.cpu()\n    \n        types = []\n        for i in range(ratio_low.shape[0]):\n            if r_low_cpu[i] < r_min:\n                types.append('ignorance')\n            elif true_mask_cpu[i] or false_mask_cpu[i]:\n                types.append('known')\n            elif abs(ratio_high_cpu[i].item() - 0.5) < delta:\n                types.append('ambiguity' if r_high_cpu[i] < r_max else 'contradiction')\n            else:\n                types.append('unknown')\n    \n        return preds, types\n\n    # 수정\n    def predict_geometric(self, input_ids, **kwargs):\n        self.eval()\n        with torch.no_grad():\n            subspace_out = self.forward(input_ids)\n        return self.classify_geometric(subspace_out, **kwargs)\n\n            \n    def analyze_geometric(self, val_loader, device, r_min=1.0, r_max=5.0, delta=0.3):\n        self.eval()\n    \n        correct, total = 0, 0\n        type_counts = Counter()\n    \n        with torch.no_grad():\n            for batch in val_loader:\n                input_ids = batch['input_ids'].to(device)\n                labels = batch['label'].to(device)\n    \n                preds, types = self.predict_geometric(\n                    input_ids,\n                    r_min=r_min,\n                    r_max=r_max,\n                    delta=delta\n                )\n    \n                known_mask = (preds != 1)\n    \n                if known_mask.any():\n                    correct += (preds[known_mask] == labels[known_mask]).sum().item()\n                    total += known_mask.sum().item()\n    \n                type_counts.update(types)\n    \n        total_samples = sum(type_counts.values())\n    \n        print(\"\\n--- Geometric Energy Space 분석 ---\")\n    \n        acc = correct / total if total > 0 else 0.0\n        print(f\"Known 정확도: {acc:.4f}\")\n    \n        if total_samples > 0:\n            print(f\"Ignorance: {type_counts['ignorance']} ({type_counts['ignorance']/total_samples*100:.1f}%)\")\n            print(f\"Ambiguity: {type_counts['ambiguity']} ({type_counts['ambiguity']/total_samples*100:.1f}%)\")\n            print(f\"Contradiction: {type_counts['contradiction']} ({type_counts['contradiction']/total_samples*100:.1f}%)\")\n            print(f\"Known: {type_counts['known']} ({type_counts['known']/total_samples*100:.1f}%)\")\n        else:\n            print(\"데이터가 존재하지 않습니다.\")\n\n\nmodel_v2 = ContraMamba(\"state-spaces/mamba-130m-hf\").to(device)\nprint(f\"✅ ContraMamba + AttentionPooling 로드 완료!\")\nprint(f\"학습 파라미터: {sum(p.numel() for p in model_v2.parameters() if p.requires_grad):,}\")","metadata":{"trusted":true,"execution":{"iopub.status.busy":"2026-05-13T10:40:58.777042Z","iopub.execute_input":"2026-05-13T10:40:58.777625Z","iopub.status.idle":"2026-05-13T10:41:04.577691Z","shell.execute_reply.started":"2026-05-13T10:40:58.777594Z","shell.execute_reply":"2026-05-13T10:41:04.576800Z"}},"outputs":[{"output_type":"display_data","data":{"text/plain":"config.json: AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(\"state-spaces/mamba-130m-hf\")\n\ndef preprocess(example):\n    if random.random() > 0.5:\n        text = example['question'] + \" \" + example['passage']\n    else:\n        text = example['passage'] + \" \" + example['question']\n    encoding = tokenizer(\n        text,\n        max_length=128,\n        truncation=True,\n        padding='max_length',\n        return_tensors='pt'\n    )\n    label = 2 if example['answer'] else 0\n    return {\n        'input_ids': encoding['input_ids'].squeeze(),\n        'label': label\n    }\n\ntrain_data = dataset['train'].map(preprocess)\nval_data = dataset['validation'].map(preprocess)\ntrain_data.set_format(type='torch', columns=['input_ids', 'label'])\nval_data.set_format(type='torch', columns=['input_ids', 'label'])\n\ntrain_loader = DataLoader(train_data, batch_size=8, shuffle=True, num_workers=2, pin_memory=True)\nval_loader = DataLoader(val_data, batch_size=4, num_workers=2, pin_memory=True)\n\noptimizer_v2 = AdamW(model_v2.parameters(), lr=2e-5, weight_decay=0.1)\nscaler = GradScaler('cuda')\n\n\nprint(\"데이터 준비 완료\")","metadata":{"trusted":true,"execution":{"iopub.status.busy":"2026-05-13T10:41:09.017024Z","iopub.execute_input":"2026-05-13T10:41:09.017339Z","iopub.status.idle":"2026-05-13T10:41:21.129489Z","shell.execute_reply.started":"2026-05-13T10:41:09.017310Z","shell.execute_reply":"2026-05-13T10:41:21.128703Z"}},"outputs":[{"output_type":"display_data","data":{"text/plain":"README.md: 10 로드 완료\")","metadata":{"trusted":true},"outputs":[],"execution_count":null},{"cell_type":"code","source":"from collections import Counter\nimport matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n\ndef run_experiment(epochs=10, start_epoch=0):\n    frozen_pos_low = frozen_neg_low = False\n    frozen_pos_mid = frozen_neg_mid = False\n    frozen_pos_high = frozen_neg_high = False\n\n    for epoch in range(epochs):\n        actual_epoch = start_epoch + epoch + 1\n        \n        # ── Train ──\n        model_v2.train()\n        pbar = tqdm(train_loader, desc=f\"Epoch {actual_epoch} [Train]\")\n        \n        for batch in pbar:\n            input_ids = batch['input_ids'].to(device)\n            labels = batch['label'].to(device)\n            optimizer_v2.zero_grad()\n            \n            with autocast('cuda'):\n                subspace_out = model_v2(input_ids=input_ids)\n                loss = model_v2.compute_loss(subspace_out, labels)\n            \n            if torch.isnan(loss):\n                print(\"NaN detected\")\n                optimizer_v2.zero_grad()\n                continue\n            \n            scaler.scale(loss).backward()\n            scaler.unscale_(optimizer_v2)\n            torch.nn.utils.clip_grad_norm_(model_v2.parameters(), max_norm=1.0)\n            scaler.step(optimizer_v2)\n            scaler.update()\n            pbar.set_postfix({'loss': f\"{loss.item():.4f}\"})\n        \n        gc.collect()\n        torch.cuda.empty_cache()\n        \n        # ── Eval ──\n        model_v2.eval()\n        \n        correct, total = 0, 0\n        type_counts = Counter()\n\n        ratio_low_true = []\n        ratio_low_false = []\n        \n        ratio_low_true = []\n        ratio_low_false = []\n        \n        ratio_high_all = []\n        \n        plot_x = []\n        plot_y = []\n        plot_labels = []\n        \n        with torch.no_grad():\n            for batch in tqdm(val_loader, desc=f\"Epoch {actual_epoch} [Eval]\"):\n                input_ids = batch['input_ids'].to(device)\n                labels = batch['label'].to(device)\n        \n                subspace_out = model_v2(input_ids=input_ids)\n        \n                preds, types = model_v2.classify_geometric(subspace_out)\n        \n                ratio_low  = subspace_out['ratio_low']\n                ratio_high = subspace_out['ratio_high']\n        \n                # accuracy\n                known_mask = (preds != 1)\n        \n                if known_mask.any():\n                    correct += (preds[known_mask] == labels[known_mask]).sum().item()\n                    total += known_mask.sum().item()\n        \n                # type count\n                type_counts.update(types)\n        \n                # ratio statistics\n                labels_cpu = labels.cpu()\n        \n                true_mask  = (labels_cpu == 2)\n                false_mask = (labels_cpu == 0)\n        \n                ratio_low_cpu  = ratio_low.detach().cpu()\n                ratio_high_cpu = ratio_high.detach().cpu()\n        \n                if true_mask.any():\n                    ratio_low_true.append(ratio_low_cpu[true_mask])\n        \n                if false_mask.any():\n                    ratio_low_false.append(ratio_low_cpu[false_mask])\n        \n                ratio_high_all.append(ratio_high_cpu)\n        \n                # scatter plot data\n                plot_x.append(ratio_low_cpu)\n                plot_y.append(ratio_high_cpu)\n                plot_labels.append(labels_cpu)\n\n            # frozen\n            frozen_state = {\n                'pos_low': frozen_pos_low,\n                'neg_low': frozen_neg_low,\n                'pos_mid': frozen_pos_mid,\n                'neg_mid': frozen_neg_mid,\n                'pos_high': frozen_pos_high,\n                'neg_high': frozen_neg_high,\n            }\n        \n        # ── Metrics ──\n        \n        acc = correct / total if total > 0 else 0.0\n        \n        dataset_size = len(val_loader.dataset)\n        coverage = total / dataset_size\n\n        ratio_low_true_mean = torch.cat(ratio_low_true).mean().item()\n        ratio_low_false_mean = torch.cat(ratio_low_false).mean().item()\n        low_gap = ratio_low_true_mean - ratio_low_false_mean\n        ratio_high_std = torch.cat(ratio_high_all).std().item()\n\n            # ── Freeze 체크 ──\n        if actual_epoch > 5:\n            if low_gap > 0.3 and not frozen_pos_low:\n                model_v2.subspace.S_pos_low.weight.requires_grad = False\n                model_v2.subspace.S_neg_low.weight.requires_grad = False\n                frozen_pos_low = frozen_neg_low = True\n                for g in optimizer_v2.param_groups:\n                    g['lr'] /= 2\n                print(f\"✅ Low frozen! lr → {optimizer_v2.param_groups[0]['lr']:.2e}\")\n\n        \n        print(f\"\\n--- Epoch {actual_epoch} Summary ---\")\n        print(f\"Known Accuracy: {acc:.4f}\")\n        print(f\"Known Coverage: {coverage:.4f} ({total}/{dataset_size})\")\n        \n        print(f\"Low Ratio True Mean : {ratio_low_true_mean:.4f}\")\n        print(f\"Low Ratio False Mean: {ratio_low_false_mean:.4f}\")\n        \n        print(f\"High Ratio STD: {ratio_high_std:.4f}\")\n        \n        total_types = sum(type_counts.values())\n        \n        print(f\"Ignorance    : {type_counts['ignorance']/total_types*100:.1f}%\")\n        print(f\"Ambiguity    : {type_counts['ambiguity']/total_types*100:.1f}%\")\n        print(f\"Contradiction: {type_counts['contradiction']/total_types*100:.1f}%\")\n        print(f\"Known        : {type_counts['known']/total_types*100:.1f}%\")\n        print(\"Frozen:\", frozen_state)\n        print(\"=\"*40)\n        \n        path = f'/kaggle/working/contramamba_epoch{actual_epoch}.pt'\n        torch.save(model_v2.state_dict(), path)\n        save_to_hf(actual_epoch)\n        print(f\"저장완료: contramamba_epoch{actual_epoch}.pt\")\n\n        # ── Scatter Plot ──\n        \n        x = torch.cat(plot_x).numpy()\n        y = torch.cat(plot_y).numpy()\n        c = torch.cat(plot_labels).numpy()\n        \n        plt.figure(figsize=(8, 6))\n        \n        plt.scatter(\n            x[c == 2],\n            y[c == 2],\n            alpha=0.5,\n            label='True'\n        )\n        \n        plt.scatter(\n            x[c == 0],\n            y[c == 0],\n            alpha=0.5,\n            label='False'\n        )\n        \n        plt.xlabel(\"ratio_low\")\n        plt.ylabel(\"ratio_high\")\n        plt.title(f\"Geometry Scatter Epoch {actual_epoch}\")\n        \n        plt.legend()\n        plt.grid(True)\n        \n        plt.show()\n\n\nrun_experiment()","metadata":{"trusted":true,"execution":{"iopub.status.busy":"2026-05-13T11:00:48.805447Z","iopub.execute_input":"2026-05-13T11:00:48.806009Z","iopub.status.idle":"2026-05-13T11:48:42.956018Z","shell.execute_reply.started":"2026-05-13T11:00:48.805969Z","shell.execute_reply":"2026-05-13T11:48:42.955107Z"}},"outputs":[{"output_type":"display_data","data":{"text/plain":"Epoch
